name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-tbm

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-tbm
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Tbm SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Tbm SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-tbm
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common tbm
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.tbm.v20180129.tbm_client.TbmClient.DescribeUserPortrait
documentation:
通过分析洞察参与过品牌媒体互动的用户，比如公开发表品牌的新闻评论、在公开社交渠道发表过对品牌的评价观点等用户，返回用户的画像属性分布，例如性别、年龄、地域、喜爱的明星、喜爱的影视。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeUserPortrait.

type request



rtype

```
